preconditions: User is not authenticated and is operating in guest state.
Home page load completes successfully before interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify guest user can directly access Home page using the approved entry URL
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session.
Wait for the Home page to complete loading.
testCases.expectedResult: The application loads successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home and displays the Home page in guest state without prompting for authentication.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Person/Profile button navigates guest user to the login page URL
steps: Observe the resulting URL in the browser.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the Login page and the browser URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Customer signup button navigates guest user to customer-search workflow entry
steps: Click the Customer signup button once.
Observe the resulting URL in the browser.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the customer-search workflow entry page and the browser URL contains /customer-search.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Clean survey button navigates guest user to vehicle-survey workflow entry
steps: Click the Clean survey button once.
Observe the resulting URL in the browser.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the vehicle-survey workflow entry page and the browser URL contains vehicle-survey.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Site survey button navigates guest user to survey workflow entry
steps: Click the Site survey button once.
Observe the resulting URL in the browser.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the survey workflow entry page and the browser URL contains survey?data.

testCases.title: Verify all approved Home page navigation controls are enabled together after page load
steps: Attempt to focus or interact with each approved Home page button without leaving the page.
testCases.expectedResult: All approved Home page buttons accept interaction and none of the controls appear disabled, blocked, or non-clickable.
